channel.title: PPG12 Analysis Results
channel.description: Isolated Photon Cross-Section, pp √s = 200 GeV — sPHENIX

item.title: Vertex Distribution and Δ z in Single vs. Double-Interaction MC
item.description: This note characterizes the vertex distributions and vertex displacement (Δ z = z_vtx^reco - z_vtx^truth) in single-interaction and full GEANT double-interaction Monte Carlo samples used for the sPHE…

item.title: Eta Edge Migration Study: Fake Rate from Fiducial Boundary Effects
item.description: This note documents a study of pseudorapidity edge migration effects in the sPHENIX isolated photon cross-section measurement (PPG12). Both the truth and reconstructed fiducial cuts are set at < 0.7,…

item.title: Photon Efficiency and Energy Response with ΔR Truth-Matching Removed: Single, Double, and Mixed Interaction MC
item.description: Building on the companion study~dr_study that demonstrated the ΔR < 0.1 truth-matching cut rejects 3.5% of correctly track-ID-matched truth photons in single-interaction MC, this note quantifies the…

item.title: Study of the ΔR Truth-Matching Requirement in Single-Interaction MC
item.description: This note documents a study of the ΔR < 0.1 geometric truth-matching requirement used in the reconstruction efficiency calculation for the sPHENIX isolated photon cross-section measurement (PPG12). W…

item.title: MC Vertex Reweighting for PPG12: A Data-Driven Iterative Method on the Truth Vertex
item.description: The PPG12 efficiency pipeline must reweight MC to match the measured p+p luminous region, which is very different between the two crossing angles (53 cm at 0 mrad vs 22 cm at 1.5 mrad, Piwinski narro…

item.title: ABCD Purity Non-Closure: Non-Tight BDT Lower Bound and Flat Threshold Partitions
item.description: We scan the non-tight BDT lower bound (analysis.non\_tight.bdt\_min) from its nominal value of 0.02 to 0.05 and 0.10 and quantify the ABCD purity non-closure against the MC truth purity in each of th…

item.title: Updates Since Preliminary Result: BDT, NPB Removal, Double Interactions, and Shower Shape Comparisons
item.description: This report summarizes the major analysis updates implemented since the preliminary isolated photon cross-section result in pp collisions at s = 200~ with sPHENIX Run~24 data. Four work streams are c…

item.title: Investigation: MC Purity Correction Factor in PPG12
item.description: The PPG12 isolated photon cross-section measurement employs the ABCD method to estimate photon purity from data. The four ABCD regions are defined by two axes: a BDT-based tight/non-tight classificat…

item.title: Isolation E_T Definition Comparison: 60 MeV Tower Threshold vs. 120 MeV vs. Topo-Cluster R=0.4
item.description: The isolated photon cross-section measurement relies on a reconstruction-level isolation energy cut to define the signal region in the ABCD method. Three isolation definitions are available in the sl…

item.title: Topo-cluster isolation distributions and photon-energy containment vs inner-R
item.description: The nominal PPG12 isolation variable is the R = 0.4 topo-cluster energy around the seed cluster: recoiso_ET^nom = cluster\_iso\_topo\_04, which by construction in CaloAna24 equals _R<0.4 E_T^topo - E…

item.title: Shower Shape Comparison: Nominal vs Double-Interaction Mixed MC: 0 mrad (22.4% DI) and 1.5 mrad (7.9% DI) Crossing Angles
item.description: In pp collisions at RHIC, two independent collisions can occur in the same bunch crossing (double interaction / pileup), distorting reconstructed cluster kinematics and shower shapes. To quantify thi…

item.title: Double-Interaction (Pileup) Effects in PPG12: Efficiency, Shower Shapes, Truth-Vertex Reweighting, Cluster Size, and Energy Response
item.description: Run-24 pp data at s = 200 contain two crossing-angle periods (0 mrad and 1.5 mrad) with very different pileup conditions, where two independent collisions in the same bunch crossing shift the reconst…

item.title: Converted vs. Unconverted Photons: Shower Shape, Isolation, and Energy Response in photon10 MC
item.description: We study the impact of photon conversions (pre-EMCal pair production in detector material) on reconstruction observables used by the PPG12 isolated-photon cross-section measurement in pp at s=200~GeV…

item.title: Cluster Size vs E_T^γ: Data vs MC, Split vs No-Split, Single vs Double Interaction
item.description: Cluster size (the number of EMCal towers associated with a cluster and the transverse extent of that set of towers) is a basic shape property that underlies every shower-shape-based background discri…

item.title: BDT Training Pipeline Audit: Reweighting flatness, training outputs, feature sync, NPB
item.description: A five-agent audit of the PPG12 XGBoost photon-ID training pipeline (FunWithxgboost/) was run to verify that (a) the E_T^γ reweighting actually produces flat E_T^γ spectra for signal and background,…

item.title: Selection Plots: Config Comparisons
item.description: difffile— config\_bdt\_nom.yaml difffile+++ config\_bdt\_tightbdt50.yaml diffhunk@@ -20,5 +20,5 @@ response\_outfile: "/sphenix/user/shuhangli/ppg12/efficiencytool/results/MC\_response" data\_outfile…
